creator: guido@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, Nov 13, 1999 at 02:32:45PM +0100, Jeroen Ruigrok/Asmodai wrote:
> Can this PR be closed?
> 
> ipfilter has been removed from CURRENT and Guido will prepare a new
> ipfilter package for importing and I think he will keep the manpages
> bound to the relevant sections.

I'd rather kep it open untill after my commits. That way we'll be sure it
gets done.

I'll reassign it to me.

-Guido
